_meta.description: Deterministic cross-evidence correlation rules. All 8 rules evaluate against live evidence values — no domain logic in Python. To add a rule: increment rule_count, assign a unique rule_id, and restart (policy_loader validates at startup).

rules.title: Ghost Billing Cluster
rules.narrative: Satellite observations contradict reported progress AND DPR risk analysis flags critical violations — consistent with ghost billing pattern.
recommendations: Freeze all milestone disbursements immediately.
Initiate physical site inspection within 48 hours.
Refer discrepancy to CVC for fraud investigation.

rules.title: Evidence Integrity Risk
rules.narrative: Submitted site photographs show signs of manipulation while satellite independently records no significant progress — high manipulation risk.
recommendations: Confiscate original, unedited site photographs.
Issue legal notice under IPC Section 471.
Reduce NCRI score by 50 points immediately.

rules.title: Safety-Progress Mismatch
rules.narrative: Low safety compliance observed alongside minimal satellite-verified activity suggests site is underperforming on both safety and execution dimensions.
recommendations: Issue PPE show-cause notice under IS:7969.
Request revised milestone schedule from contractor.

rules.title: Triple Convergence — Maximum Severity
rules.narrative: Three independent evidence streams (satellite, DPR intelligence, forensics) converge on a high-risk signal — consistent with systematic fraud.
recommendations: Escalate immediately to Ministry-level oversight.
Initiate police/CBI referral under IPC Section 420.
Suspend all ongoing project disbursements.

rules.title: DPR Inflation without Satellite Evidence
rules.narrative: DPR analysis flags high-risk violations but satellite shows normal activity levels — possible documentation irregularity without physical impact yet.
recommendations: Request original approval certificates for flagged violations.
Schedule DPR documentation audit within 30 days.

rules.title: Forensics Tampering without Corroboration
rules.narrative: Site photographs indicate possible manipulation but satellite data does not independently confirm a discrepancy. Further investigation required.
recommendations: Request unedited, time-stamped originals from site camera system.
Do not release milestone payment until originals are verified.

rules.title: Safety Crisis during Active Construction
rules.narrative: Critical safety non-compliance is occurring concurrently with schedule lag or progress fraud — workers may be at risk while documentation irregularities are concealed.
recommendations: Issue emergency stop-work advisory pending safety audit.
Deduct financial penalty under Clause 14A.
Conduct joint CPWD + Labour Ministry site inspection.

rules.title: Lagging Progress — Documentation Only
rules.narrative: Satellite indicates progress lag but DPR intelligence finds no critical violations — may indicate legitimate execution delay rather than fraud.
recommendations: Request revised schedule from contractor within 7 days.
Monitor next satellite cycle before escalating.
